description: You need to optimize the meeting schedule for next Monday to eliminate a downtime gap and consolidate locations. Reschedule the 'Q2 Financial Review' to start immediately after the 'Team Standup' (9:00 AM - 9:30 AM, Main Conference Room) ends. The 'Q2 Financial Review' must be moved to the 'Main Conference Room' and retain its original duration of 1 hour 30 minutes. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'admin'.
